raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line so timestamps lead each line, matching v1.3 raw.log format.
notes: Go test failure in cli/cli on macos-latest only (linux build presumably passed since only macos failed in this run). Single failing test: TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence/selections_persist_after_changing_search_query in internal/prompter package. Failure message: 'form.Run() did not complete in time' (huh_prompter_test.go:478) — strongly suggests a timing flake on the slower macOS runner, hence flaky_or_transient = true. Two interesting properties for benchmarking: (1) signal_position = middle (FAIL block at L243-247 of 545 lines ≈ 45%) — the primary diagnostic is OUTSIDE tail-200's window (L346-545), so tail-200 sees only the bare 'FAIL' + '##[error]' at L510-511 without the actual test name or message; (2) Go ecosystem (was 0/16 in v1.3, target 4 in v2). Selected as Batch 2 case 1.
